user.title: Add a patient
user.description: Create a medication schedule for a pet or person. Choose who should be reminded; you can add their doses next.

abort.already_configured: A patient with this name is already configured.

add_dose.title: Add a dose
add_dose.description: Pick the time and list the medications given at it.

settings.title: Reminder settings
settings.description: Who to notify, when doses reset for the day, and how the reminders nag.
